[
  { "type": "insert_script", "payload": { "name": "CameraController", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts", "source": "local Players = game:GetService('Players')
local RunService = game:GetService('RunService')
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild('Humanoid')
local camera = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera

local function onRenderStep(dt)
  local direction = (character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - camera.CFrame.Position).Unit
  local rotation = camera.CFrame:ToWorldSpace(CFrame.new(0, 0, -1)).Unit
  camera.CFrame = camera.CFrame:Lerp(character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 2, -5), 0.1)
  camera.FieldOfView = 70
end

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(onRenderStep)" } }
]

[
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "ScreenGui", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts", "name": "PlayerUI" } },
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "Frame", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts.PlayerUI", "name": "ScoreFrame", "properties": { "Size": [0.2, 0.05], "Position": [0.4, 0.9], "BackgroundTransparency": 0.5, "BackgroundColor3": [1, 1, 1] } } },
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "TextLabel", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts.PlayerUI.ScoreFrame", "name": "ScoreLabel", "properties": { "Size": [1, 1], "Text": "Score: 0", "TextColor3": [0, 0, 0], "Font": [2, "ArialBold"] } } },
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "Frame", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts.PlayerUI", "name": "HealthFrame", "properties": { "Size": [0.2, 0.05], "Position": [0.6, 0.9], "BackgroundTransparency": 0.5, "BackgroundColor3": [1, 0, 0] } } },
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "TextLabel", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts.PlayerUI.HealthFrame", "name": "HealthLabel", "properties": { "Size": [1, 1], "Text": "Health: 100", "TextColor3": [0, 0, 0], "Font": [2, "ArialBold"] } } },
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "Frame", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts.PlayerUI", "name": "MiniMapFrame", "properties": { "Size": [0.2, 0.2], "Position": [0.8, 0.8], "BackgroundTransparency": 0.5, "BackgroundColor3": [0, 0, 0] } } },
  { "type": "insert_script", "payload": { "name": "UIUpdater", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts.PlayerUI", "source": "local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild('Humanoid')
local scoreLabel = script.Parent.ScoreFrame.ScoreLabel
local healthLabel = script.Parent.HealthFrame.HealthLabel

local function updateScore()
  scoreLabel.Text = 'Score: ' .. player.leaderstats.Score.Value
end

local function updateHealth()
  healthLabel.Text = 'Health: ' .. humanoid.Health
end

player.leaderstats.Score:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Value'):Connect(updateScore)
humanoid.HealthChanged:Connect(updateHealth)" } }
]

[
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "Folder", "parent": "ServerScriptService", "name": "MissionSystem" } },
  { "type": "insert_script", "payload": { "name": "MissionManager", "parent": "ServerScriptService.MissionSystem", "source": "local MissionManager = {}
local Players = game:GetService('Players')
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage')
local Missions = {}

function MissionManager:createMission(name, objective, reward)
  local mission = {}
  mission.name = name
  mission.objective = objective
  mission.reward = reward
  mission.completed = false
  table.insert(Missions, mission)
end

function MissionManager:getMissions()
  return Missions
end

function MissionManager:completeMission(player, missionName)
  for _, mission in pairs(Missions) do
    if mission.name == missionName then
      mission.completed = true
      player.leaderstats.Score.Value = player.leaderstats.Score.Value + mission.reward
      print(player.Name .. ' completed mission ' .. missionName)
    end
  end
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
  player.leaderstats = Instance.new('Folder')
  player.leaderstats.Parent = player
  player.leaderstats.Score = Instance.new('IntValue')
  player.leaderstats.Score.Value = 0
  player.leaderstats.Score.Parent = player.leaderstats
end)

MissionManager:createMission('GatherResources', 'Collect 10 resources', 100)
MissionManager:createMission('DefeatEnemy', 'Defeat 5 enemies', 200)
" } },
  { "type": "insert_script", "payload": { "name": "MissionClient", "parent": "StarterScripts.StarterPlayerScripts", "name": "MissionClient", "source": "local Players = game:GetService('Players')
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage')
local MissionManager = game.ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild('MissionManager')

local function getMissions()
  local missions = MissionManager:getMissions()
  for _, mission in pairs(missions) do
    print(mission.name .. ': ' .. mission.objective)
  end
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.MissionManager:GetMissionsOnServer():Connect(getMissions)
" } },
  { "type": "create_instance", "payload": { "className": "RemoteEvent", "parent": "ReplicatedStorage", "name": "GetMissions" } },
  { "type": "insert_script", "payload": { "name": "MissionServer", "parent": "ServerScriptService.MissionSystem", "source": "local MissionManager = script.Parent.MissionManager
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage')
local GetMissions = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild('GetMissions')

GetMissions.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
  local missions = MissionManager:getMissions()
  for _, mission in pairs(missions) do
    print(mission.name .. ': ' .. mission.objective)
  end
end)" } }
]

currentPlan.title: GTA Like Game
currentPlan.summary: SCALE & GRID STRATEGY: Using the humanoid scale of 1 Character Unit (H) = 5 studs, we will calculate sizes of objects and roads. The size ratios are: Car (3H long), Road Lane (2.4H wide), Story (2.4H tall). The ground level is calculated as Ground_Y = Baseplate.Position.Y + (Baseplate.Size.Y / 2), and the snap formula for object positioning is Object.Position.Y = Ground_Y + (Object.Size.Y / 2).

steps.description: Create the ground/baseplate: Size [512, 1, 512] at [0, -0.5, 0]. Material: Grass.
Insert a main highway road using insert_free_model with assetId 106470926724188. Size to [12, 1, 200] at [0, 0.5, 0].
Insert a modern office building using insert_free_model with assetId 86072212324259. Position at [60, Ground_Y + Size.Y/2, 0] using the snap formula.
Insert a skyscraper building using insert_free_model with assetId 106470926724188. Position at [-60, Ground_Y + Size.Y/2, 0] using the snap formula.
Insert a police car vehicle using insert_free_model with assetId 6418230807. Position at [0, Ground_Y + 3, 30] using the snap formula.
Insert a Mercedes vehicle using insert_free_model with assetId 6527733561. Position at [0, Ground_Y + 3, -30] using the snap formula.
Create a Script in ServerScriptService for player spawning and game logic.
Create a LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts for player input handling and UI updates.
Configure the physics system for vehicle collisions and interactions.
Implement a camera system for smooth player movement and rotation.
Add UI elements for player score, health, and mini-map.
Implement a mission system with objectives and rewards.
